overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character leading his horse through deep snow on a mountain path at night. The character holds a lantern that illuminates the immediate surroundings while walking along a ridge and through open snow fields surrounded by snow-covered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge path with cliff drop

agents.ego_description: cowboy character leading horse through deep snow along narrow mountain ridge, holding lantern to light the path

notable_agents.action: horse following closely behind the character, walking through deep snow

entered.detail: snow-covered path along mountain edge with deep snow
dark precipice falling away to the left of the path
distant snow-laden evergreen trees on the mountainside
warm yellow light illuminating the snow immediately around the character

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow snowy mountain ridge at night. The character walks forward leading a horse, with a steep cliff drop visible to the left. The lantern casts a warm pool of light on the snow, contrasting with the dark blue night sky and distant snow-covered pines.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered pine trees

events.description: horse stops briefly then resumes walking alongside the character

agents.ego_description: continuing through open snow field with horse now walking beside rather than behind

notable_agents.action: horse walking alongside the character, occasionally lagging behind

entered.detail: expansive flat area covered in deep snow with no immediate obstacles
thick line of snow-covered trees marking the edge of the open field

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into a wide snow field as the cliff disappears behind. The horse moves to walk beside the character, occasionally stopping. Snow-covered pine trees become visible on both sides, with a dense forest line appearing in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy trail through forested mountain area

agents.ego_description: trudging through deeper snow toward the tree line with horse following steadily

notable_agents.action: horse following directly behind through the deeper snow

entered.detail: narrower trail leading into the forested area with deeper snow

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower snowy trail as the forest closes in. The horse follows directly behind, both leaving deep tracks in the fresh snow. The lantern light reveals snow-covered pines now closer on both sides as they approach the dense tree line.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a treacherous mountain path that transitions from a narrow ridge into a wide snow field and finally into a dense forest. It begins on a steep ridge at night, where the character leads a horse beside a cliff drop under a dark blue sky, with a lantern casting a warm glow on the frozen ground. As the cliff disappears behind them, the terrain opens into a vast snow field where the horse moves closer to the character and snow-covered pines emerge on both sides. The scene then shifts as the open space narrows into a trail, with the forest closing in and the lantern light revealing thick clusters of pines. Finally, the camera follows the pair as they leave deep tracks in the fresh snow, moving steadily toward the looming density of the tree line.
